name: mrinal-skills
description: Mrinal Dhillon's portable personal Claude Code skills, grouped into installable plugins.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Cross-repo personal Claude Code layer: skills (cost-aware delegation, orchestrator-worker fan-out, trunk-based git workflow, tiered deep research), review/search/doc agents, the distinguished-engineer output style, and universal git/secret guard hooks.

plugins.name: scaffold
plugins.description: Project-enabled scaffolding layer: milestone/dev/skill-maintenance workflows, ADR + milestone commands, context-checkpoint & config-guard hooks, and a determinism auditor. Enable per-repo; pairs with core.
